ashwake.configuration.title: Ashwake Config
intro.ashwake.bad.1: - Nightfall Lock - darkness falls early; rest is denied.
intro.ashwake.bad.2: - Ashwake Storm - thunder rolls, the air grows heavy.
intro.ashwake.body.1: Beneath the mountain, an ancient heart turns.
intro.ashwake.body.2: Every ten minutes the world shifts.
intro.ashwake.body.3: Listen for the omen, and prepare.
intro.ashwake.story.line1: Beneath the mountain, an ancient heart turns.
intro.ashwake.story.line2: Its breath is the sky - calm one moment, cruel the next.
intro.ashwake.story.line3: Every ten minutes the Core chooses a new mood.
intro.ashwake.story.line6: At the Ritual Circle, the Core can be read, and sometimes, answered.
intro.ashwake.story.final: Talk to Guidance to learn how to survive the Core's moods.
intro.ashwake.hint.guidance: Guidance can be found near the Ritual Circle.
intro.ashwake.summary.title: CORE SUMMARY
intro.ashwake.summary.safe: Within the volcano, the Core is kinder.
intro.ashwake.footer: Stand near the Ritual Circle to watch the Core's pulse.
intro.ashwake.good.1: - Dawn Blessing - sunrise returns, hands grow swift.
intro.ashwake.good.2: - Ember Warmth - heat shields you from harm.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.intro: The Core's moods are not meant to kill you - only to test you. Good moods grant blessings. Bad moods bring trials. Rare moods change everything.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.bad.dread: Dread Fog - the air turns heavy and sight grows uncertain.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.bad.gravity: Gravity Flux - Motion warps. Steps feel strange underfoot.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.bad.nightfall: Nightfall Lock - Sleep is denied while the Core holds the night.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.bad.storm: Ashwake Storm - Heavy ash fog, thunder, and pressure in the air.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.good.clear: Clear Skies - Light and mobility improve with a calm horizon.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.good.dawn: Dawn Blessing - Sunrise energy grants speed, haste, and regeneration.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.good.drizzle: Prosperous Drizzle - A silver rain that favors fortune.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.good.ember: Ember Warmth - Fire resistance and forge-like momentum.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.good.tailwind: Tailwind - Windborne movement buffs and gentle lift.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.rare.eclipse: Eclipse Minute - Day falls silent; power concentrates.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.rare.skyfractur: Skyfracture Pulse - Sharp energy surges across the sky.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.safe_zone: Within the volcano, the Core is kinder.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.tip.circle: Tip: Watch the ritual circle and orb for omen cues.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.tip.omen: Tip: Omen phase starts before each state change.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.tip.safe: Tip: Safe radius softens bad-state pressure.
intro.ashwake.learn_more.title: Ashwake Core Reference
intro.ashwake.preview.safe: Within the volcano, the Core is kinder.
intro.ashwake.rare.1: - Eclipse - daylight dims. The Core watches.
intro.ashwake.title: THE ASHWAKE CORE AWAKENS
message.ashwake.ritual_active: The ritual circle hums with controlled power.
message.ashwake.ritual_dormant: The ritual circle is dormant. The air tastes of ash.
message.ashwake.ritual_locked: The sigils are sealed. The circle rejects your touch.
message.ashwake.world_core_pulse: The Core pulses with unseen power...
